description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The exterior features a mix of white and gray surfaces, with large windows and sliding glass doors that allow for ample natural light. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, a small green lawn, and a main entryway with a covered porch. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with additional green space and patio areas. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others in smaller groupings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces. Features include a garage, driveway, front lawn, and private backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long boundary wall, garage, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and large rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible entry steps, side lawn, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a modern door adjacent to the garage
